classObjective: Position and label triangles on the coordinate plane using given side lengths and properties.
workedExamples: 14-7, Example 1 — Position and Label Triangles on the Coordinate Plane
14-7, Example 2 — Find Missing Coordinates of Triangles Using Distance Formula
warmUp: What strategies make coordinate proofs easier?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: strategic placement (right angle at origin, base on axis, isosceles with vertex on perpendicular bisector); coordinate proof setup
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice positioning triangles on coordinate plane for efficient proofs
independentPractice: Practice problems positioning and labeling triangles with given properties on coordinate plane
assessment: Exit ticket: position an isosceles triangle with base endpoints at (0,0) and (6,0) on a coordinate plane and explain your placement
capReflection: Why does strategic placement of a triangle on the coordinate plane make coordinate proofs easier?
